lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Hey there adventurer. I am Gordon, the Account security tutor. I can help you with anything account security related, would you like to know anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I keep my account secure?

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: There are many ways you can strengthen your account security, which would you like to hear more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about passwords.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Your password is the first line of defence in keeping your account secure.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: When choosing a password, make sure to keep it unique. You can do this by using a mix of letters and numbers. You could even use numbers in the middle of your password.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: For extra security, you should make sure you use a different password for your account and email.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: You should keep your password safe and tell no one. Not even your friends or family.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about securing my email.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Make sure you use a separate password for your email account. This will help boost your security and make it less likely for hijackers to steal your account.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: You should also enable two-step authentication on your email account, if your email supports it.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: This could be done through an authenticator app supplied by your email provider, or it could be done using your mobile phone number.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: The type of authenticator changes based on provider, but when active, hijackers will find it hard to access your account. Also, if you get any backup codes, keep them safe.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the authenticator.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: The RuneScape authenticator will provide your account with another layer of security against hijackers who might want to steal your account.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: As well as requiring a password to enter your account, you will also need a randomly generated number from the authenticator app to login.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: You can enable the authenticator by checking your account page on the official RuneScape website.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: If you like, I can take you to a useful web page about the RuneScape authenticator.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about securing my bank.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: If someone does get into your account, you should make sure your bank is secure.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: To keep your bank secure, you should make sure to set a bank pin. A bank pin is a 4 digit code you will need to put in to access your bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It seems I don't have one setup. How do I got about setting up a bank pin?

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: To setup a bank pin you will need to visit any bank where you can find a banker. You should then speak to the banker and ask them about setting up a bank pin.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: After the bank pin has been set, you will need to wait a few days for the pin to take effect.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I should go speak to a banker right away.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good thing I already have one set.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Good on you [lad/lass]! Great work.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Stronghold of Security.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: The Stronghold of Security can be found in the Barbarian Village, west of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Here you will be tested on your knowledge of account security. You will need to make your way to the bottom floor while answering question on account security and fighting monsters.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Be aware, the deeper into the stronghold you go, the tougher the monster will be. So make sure you bring your best equipment and some food.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: If you do manage to make it to the end of each floor, you will be able to loot the chest for some loot. But only once per floor.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: If you decide to kill the monsters, you might find they drop some skull sceptre pieces.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting, thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have a Security book?

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Sure thing, here you go.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Use it well.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: You already have one, maybe you should read that one instead.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't I know you from somewhere?

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Ah, you're probably talking about my twin brother who works at the Port Sarim prison.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: He spends all his time giving out security books when he could tell you about security instead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But don't you give out security books too?

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Well yes, but at least I tell you about account security as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's true. Maybe I shouldn't be too quick to judge.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Account security tutor
lines.text: Come back any time you need any more information on account security.
